subcodes.first_line: We have, on this day, arisen to voice My praise, making mention of the oceans of My loving-kindness, and counselling My loved ones who have held fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اصبحنا الیوم ناطقا بثنائی و ذاکرا بحور عنایتی و ناصحا اولیائی الذین نمسکوا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
